## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `python -m ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes (including the dogfood test)
- [ ] If I changed the README Quick start, it is still runnable
- [ ] I did **not** weaken the integrity rule (real code bugs are never masked as doc fixes)
- [ ] New behavior has tests
